Aesthetic description to a youtube video that is a playlist of lo-fi music tracks. Having an introduction, timestamps for each track, link to github repo (nathaliafab/Lo-FAI) and a final message saying that this message was written using ChatGPT and asking people to like and subscribe. Include cute emojis.

Welcome to our Lo-Fi beats playlist! 😎🎧

Lo-Fi music is the best companion for chilling or focusing at any time. In this list, we have compiled some of the best lo-fi tracks to help you relax or improve your productivity.

00:00 - "Dusk" by Kupla
02:25 - "Warm Glow" by Lofi Radiance
05:30 - "Autumn Brawl" by Kupla
08:10 - "Soft Place" by Sleepy Fish
11:34 - "Late Night" by Lofi Radiance
14:50 - "Cherry Blossom" by Mr. Käfer

These tracks are part of 𝙻𝚘-𝙵𝙰𝙸, an open-source lo-fi music collection on Github, curated by Nathalia Fabbro. You can find all of them on the 𝙽𝚊𝚝𝚑𝚊𝚕𝚒𝚊 𝚏𝚊𝚋𝚋/𝙻𝚘-𝙵𝙰𝙸 repository.

We hope this playlist helps you unwind, concentrate, and relax. If you enjoy this mix, don't forget to like and subscribe. This message was written using ChatGPT. Thank you for listening! 💛🎶
